ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the monitoring site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the site above sea level */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., lake, river, ocean) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the site information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement session */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring site */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "depth_m" REAL /* Depth of measurement in meters */,
  "temp_C" REAL /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "chla_ugL" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration in micrograms per liter */,
  "turb_NTU" REAL /* Turbidity in NTU */,
  "cond_uScm" REAL /* Conductivity in microsiemens per centimeter */,
  "spec_cond_uScm" REAL /* Specific conductivity in microsiemens per centimeter */,
  "DO_mgL" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen concentration in milligrams per liter */,
  "DO_pSat" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen saturation percentage */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH of the water */,
  "ORP_mV" REAL /* Oxidation-reduction potential in millivolts */,
  "PAR" REAL /* Photosynthetically active radiation */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity in practical salinity units */,
  "descent_rate_m_per_s" REAL /* Rate of descent in meters per second */,
  "density_mg_m3" REAL /* Density of water in milligrams per cubic meter */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating data quality issues (0 = good, 1 = bad) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operator who conducted the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement session */,
  "quality_control" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has passed quality control checks */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the quality control process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_flag FOREIGN KEY ("flag") REFERENCES measurement_flags ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "accessed_data_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points accessed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring session */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring site */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Session start timestamp */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Session end timestamp */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operator who conducted the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., routine, special) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment and tools used during the session */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session (e.g., weather, water flow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sessions_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sessions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag indicating an issue (e.g., outlier, missing data) */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., data quality, system issue) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the flag resolution (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the flag was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth measurement */,
  "depth_m" REAL /* Depth in meters */,
  "depth_description" TEXT /* Description of the depth (e.g., surface, mid-depth, bottom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement session */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conductivity_records" (
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conductivity record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement session */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity in microsiemens per centimeter */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductivity_records_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dissolved_oxygen_records" (
  "do_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dissolved oxygen record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement session */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen concentration in milligrams per liter */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("do_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dissolved_oxygen_records_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("measurement_id")
)
